texto: He hurt me more than any punch he could land. He broke me into a million pieces, and those fragments were still scattered on the wind. He would never be able to find them all and piece them back together.
explicacao: Citação de E.L. Todd sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “He hurt me more than any punch he could land. He broke me into a million pieces, and those fragme…” articula reflexao, heartbreak, punch em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Dancing was like sex, and I knew when she and I were together it would be amazing. Physical desire and lust had nothing to do with it. We just understood when the other person would move before the actually did it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a E.L. Todd: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Dancing was like sex, and I knew when she and I were together it would be amazing. Physical desir…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, dancing, soulmates pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de soulmates.
